content.title: Asian Stocks Shrug Off Tariff Jitters
content.summary: Asian stocks rose broadly, with South Korea and Taiwan setting records, despite renewed trade uncertainty.  Hong Kong’s Hang Seng Index rose 2.5%.   South Korea’s Kospi composite closed at a record high, as did its biggest component, Samsung Electronics.

content.title: Indian Stocks Advance After U.S. Agrees to Slash Tariffs
content.summary: Indian stocks jumped after President Trump agreed to slash tariffs on the country. The U.S. is lowering levies on Indian goods to 18% after the two nations struck a trade pact and Trump said New Delhi, led by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, agreed to stop buying Russian oil.

content.title: EU-India Trade Deal by the Numbers
content.summary: That's the annual saving equivalent the European Union expects as a result of its newly struck trade deal with India.  The EU says the pact is set to eliminate or reduce tariffs for more than 90% of its goods.  It is the latest example of U.S. trading partners seeking to curb their reliance on America by expanding ties with other markets.

content.title: Market rally breakdown: Dow Jones, bitcoin, Tesla, and more
content.description:
On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average (^DJI) surged over 800 points, while both the S&P 500 (^GSPC) and Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) gained over 1% each.

Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a look at the week's biggest market moves, including action from the "Magnificent Seven" (MAGS), semiconductor sector (^SOX), software sector (IGV), CBOE Volatility Index (^VIX), 10-year Treasury yields (^TNX), the US dollar (DX-Y.NYB), bitcoin (BTC-USD), and more.

content.title: Apple defeats bid for new Apple Watch import ban at US trade tribunal
content.summary: A U.S. trade tribunal ruled for Apple on Friday against a bid from medtech company ‌Masimo to reinstate an import ban on the tech giant's ‌Apple Watches.  The U.S. International Trade Commission closed Masimo's case after declining to review an ITC ​judge's preliminary March ruling that Apple's redesigned watches do not infringe Masimo patents related to blood-oxygen reading technology.  Danaher-owned Masimo can appeal the decision to the Washington-based U.S. Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit.

content.title: Dow jumps 800 points, S&P 500 at new record, Nasdaq gains 6.8% this week
content.description:
All three of the market indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Friday's session with significant gains, led by the Dow Jones Industrial Average which rose by nearly 868 points (1.79%) in the day. The S&P 500 ended the trading week 4.5% higher while the Nasdaq Composite surged by 6.84%.

Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre notes the fresh record highs for US stocks.

content.title: Alphabet’s EU Data Sharing Fight Puts Search And AI Advantage To Test
content.summary: The European Commission has proposed that Google share core search ranking and query data with rival search providers under the Digital Markets Act. Alphabet, parent company of Google (NasdaqGS:GOOGL), is contesting the measures, which cover data that also underpins its AI models and chatbot products. The outcome could influence how much access third party search engines and AI chatbots gain to data that has historically sat within Alphabet's ecosystem. Alphabet's share price sits at...
